# Ebrostay

> Ebrostay is the bridge between companies and property owners for mid-term corporate rentals (1–12 months) in Zaragoza, Spain. We rebuild property management from first principles to deliver best-in-class service to both sides: furnished, move-in-ready homes for relocating teams and professionals, and full hands-off management for owners. Verified listings, transparent monthly pricing in EUR, online booking with secure Stripe payment (full stay plus a refundable deposit), availability calendars, and support throughout the stay. Our vision is to become Europe's number one property management company for mid-term corporate rentals — rooted in Zaragoza, built for Europe.

Ebrostay es el puente entre empresas y propietarios para el alquiler corporativo de media estancia (1–12 meses) en Zaragoza, España. Reconstruimos la gestión de propiedades desde primeros principios para ofrecer un servicio de primer nivel a ambos lados: viviendas amuebladas y listas para entrar para equipos y profesionales desplazados, y gestión integral sin esfuerzo para propietarios. Anuncios verificados, precios mensuales transparentes en EUR, reserva online con pago seguro mediante Stripe (estancia completa más fianza reembolsable), calendarios de disponibilidad y soporte durante toda la estancia. Nuestra visión es convertirnos en la empresa de gestión de propiedades número uno de Europa en alquiler corporativo de media estancia: con raíces en Zaragoza, pensada para Europa.

## Properties

- [Movera - 2 Planta](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=movera0): second-floor home with 3 private bedrooms at Camino de Movera 7, Zaragoza. From 1350 EUR/month (450 EUR/room).
- [Movera - 1 Planta](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=movera1): first-floor home with 3 private bedrooms at Camino de Movera 7, Zaragoza. From 1350 EUR/month (450 EUR/room).
- [Pedro II el Católico - 1 planta](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=pedro1): apartment at Pedro II el Católico 3, Zaragoza city centre. From 950 EUR/month.
- [Pedro II el Católico - 2 planta](https://ebrostay.com/property.html?id=pedro2): apartment at Pedro II el Católico 3, Zaragoza city centre. From 980 EUR/month.

Listings, prices and availability are kept up to date on the website; each property page shows full conditions (minimum stay, deposit, utilities), photos, an availability calendar, and online booking.

## How booking works

1. Search by dates on [ebrostay.com](https://ebrostay.com/) and open a property.
2. Pick check-in and check-out dates and pay online (Stripe). The payment covers the whole stay (billed in whole months) plus a refundable deposit.
3. The booking confirmation, invoice, and arrival details (wifi, key pickup, emergency contact) are available in the tenant's account.

- Location: Zaragoza, Spain
